headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on American International Gr, Lowers Price Target to $86
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Elyse Greenspan   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $87 to $86.
